name: scapy
summary: Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library.

documentation.readme: Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library.
usage_sections: Getting started: Scapy is usable either as a shell or as a library. For further details, please head over to Getting started with Scapy, which is part of the documentation.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/secdev/scapy. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `advanced use cases, and examples.`. Further invocations from upstream: `systems. On Windows, you need to install some mandatory dependencies as`; `documentation]($KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`. Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [wifi_2_4_ghz, wifi_5_ghz, shell_linux] in the Wireless category. Fits when the engagement needs: Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Scapy is a powerful Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

When validating lab setup, run `scapy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
